implemented_change.summary: Drive metric_context under the v1 10% unknown threshold with two deterministic has_metric lanes.

rules.name: reported_actual_metric_claims
required_signals: explicit metric period anchor or source-title period/report anchor

rules.name: observed_bus_or_corridor_operating_metrics
subjects: true_route bus route, including true routes identified by bus/SBS source context
required_signals: allowlisted bus/corridor operating, safety, ridership, survey, delay, speed, or demographic metric name
guardrails: subway, rail, commuter, LIRR, MNR, and train route descriptors remain unknown
source description text is not used as a proposal veto because many progress decks describe both observed results and proposed follow-up capital work
source title/display text still participates in proposal/future rejection

verification.result: passed: Materialized 93067/98119 submissions; SQLite FTS quick_check ok

intentionally_unresolved: Metric rows with missing same-source evidence remain unknown.
Future/planned/proposed/forecast/estimate/budget/goal/feasibility rows remain unknown unless an older exact rule already classifies them.
Money/finance entity metrics remain outside this v1 route-scoped lane.
Subway and rail schedule metrics remain outside this bus/corridor operating-metric lane.
Non-has_metric metric_context relation kinds remain outside this lane.
next_candidate_lanes: Continue Plan 004 with corridor_scope, claim_context, and timeline_context, which are still above 10%.
Do not broaden metric_context further for v1 unless another family regresses or an owner explicitly asks for additional metric cleanup.
